captures.caption: Losing a life now flashes the border red for a moment, so the hit is unmissable — then it settles back to black and play resumes.
captures.alt: When the ship is hit and respawns, the screen border blinks red several times over about a second, then returns to black.

captures.caption: Now the flash is a shield. While the border blinks, the ship flies straight back up among the descending wave and keeps the lives it has left — the brief grace that stops a respawn dying on the spot. The protection lasts exactly as long as the flash.
captures.alt: After being hit and respawning, the ship flies up among the descending enemies while the border flashes red, without losing a life; the moving ship keeps its remaining lives for as long as the border keeps flashing.
